case_title: TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES VS. GILBERT MARTINEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES AS TO DEFENDANT MARTINEZ, GILBERT DOES I THORUGH V, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
